testcase.name: test_mcp_image_handler_freezes_private_capability_fingerprint

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [('image_gene...: 'cat'}, {})] == [('image_gene...: 'cat'}, {})]
At index 0 diff: ('image_generate', {'prompt': 'draw a cat'}, {}) != ('image_generate', {'prompt': 'draw a cat'}, {'caller_capability_fingerprint': 'mcp-image-generation-a'}) Use -v to get more diff
